jobs.purpose: Translate one key via the configured driver. Called by the MaybeDispatchAutoTranslate listener + by bulk jobs iterating keys.
steps: Load Translation row (source language) to get source text.
Resolve driver via TranslatorDriverManager (respects tenant override).
On success: UPSERT Translation(tenant_id, language_id, namespace, group, key) with source='ai' + provider + quality_score + source_hash.

jobs.purpose: Translate all keys in a namespace (or across namespaces) for one or more target locales.
steps: Enumerate source keys (from file lang/* or existing Translation rows for source_locale).
For each key + target_locale: dispatch TranslateJob (chained + throttled to config('localization.bulk_translate.concurrency')).
Update TranslationJob.keys_total upfront, keys_translated / keys_failed as sub-jobs complete.

jobs.purpose: Pre-populate top-N most-frequently-accessed keys in Redis / APCu for the fastest cold-request performance.
steps: Sample analytics for top N keys per tenant + locale.
Fetch from DB and write to Redis with long TTL (7 days).

jobs.purpose: Delete Translation rows past retention (source='ai' + translated_at older than tenant_locale.auto_translate_ttl_hours).
Verify DB Translation row counts match Redis cache counters. Warns on drift.
